title: Check Building Overview Screen for Facility Area Status Display
summary: Use the Building Overview screen to verify that the facility layout is displayed and that each shown area has a color-coded status indication. This runbook is limited to confirming screen presence and recording displayed colors; it does not define color meanings.
when_to_use: Use when an operator needs to confirm that the Building Overview HMI screen is accessible, shows the layout of the entire facility, and presents a color-coded status for each area.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer the meaning of any displayed color from this source section alone.
Do not use this runbook for corrective action or troubleshooting beyond confirming whether the Building Overview screen displays the facility layout and area-level color-coded status.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Building Overview screen, verify the displayed facility layout and area status colors, and record observed colors exactly as shown if needed.

safety_notes: This source supports screen observation only.
Do not infer the meaning of any color from this section alone.

system_preconditions: The HMI must be available so the operator can press OVERVIEW and view the Building Overview screen.

visual_references.description: Building Overview screen showing the facility layout with color-coded status by area.
Nearby HMI screen context referenced on the same manual page as the Building Overview screen access description.

steps.title: Open the Building Overview screen
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen described by the source so the facility-wide display can be checked.
steps.instruction: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.
steps.expected_result: The Building Overview screen opens on the HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI displays the Building Overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The Building Overview screen does not open or is not available after pressing OVERVIEW.

actions.label: Open Building Overview
actions.exact_action: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the figure as the reference image for the Building Overview screen that should appear after pressing OVERVIEW.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not display as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.

steps.title: Confirm the facility layout is displayed
steps.purpose: Verify that the screen presents the overall facility view described by the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the facility layout displayed on the Building Overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The screen shows the layout of the entire facility.
steps.healthy_condition: A facility-wide layout is visible on the Building Overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not show the layout of the entire facility.

actions.label: Inspect facility layout
actions.exact_action: Identify the facility layout displayed on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Review the overall facility layout shown in the Building Overview screen figure.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not display the facility layout as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

steps.title: Locate the displayed facility areas
steps.purpose: Identify the individual areas on the facility layout so their status indications can be checked.
steps.instruction: Locate the individual areas shown within the facility layout.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the displayed areas on the Building Overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Individual areas are visible within the facility layout.
steps.failure_condition: Individual areas cannot be identified on the displayed facility layout.

actions.label: Locate facility areas
actions.exact_action: Locate the individual areas shown within the facility layout.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Identify the separate areas shown within the facility layout on the Building Overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed layout does not show identifiable facility areas.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

steps.title: Verify color-coded status is shown for each area
steps.purpose: Confirm that each displayed area has a visible color-coded status indication, as described by the source.
steps.instruction: Check whether each displayed area has a color-coded status indication associated with it.
steps.expected_result: Each displayed area shows a color-coded status indication.
steps.healthy_condition: A color-coded status is visible for each displayed area.
steps.failure_condition: One or more displayed areas do not show a color-coded status indication.

actions.label: Check area status colors
actions.exact_action: Check whether each displayed area has a color-coded status indication associated with it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the color-coded status indications associated with each displayed area on the Building Overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not display area-level color-coded status as described.
Stop if interpretation of color meaning is required, because this source section does not define color meanings.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

steps.title: Record displayed area status colors if needed
steps.purpose: Capture the current screen state exactly as shown for documentation or support follow-up.
steps.instruction: Record the observed area status colors exactly as displayed if documentation or support personnel need the current screen state.
steps.expected_result: Observed area status colors are documented exactly as displayed on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The current Building Overview screen state is recorded without interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed colors are not recorded accurately or are interpreted beyond what is shown.

actions.label: Document displayed colors
actions.exact_action: Record the observed area status colors exactly as displayed if documentation or support personnel need the current screen state.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the Building Overview screen figure as the reference for the facility layout and area color presentation to be recorded.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not display the facility layout or area-level color-coded status as described.
Stop if asked to assign meaning to the colors using this source section alone.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.
Do not infer the meaning of any color from this section alone.

success_criteria: The Building Overview screen is accessible from the HMI by pressing OVERVIEW.
The screen shows the layout of the entire facility.
Each displayed area has a color-coded status indication.
If needed, the currently displayed area status colors are recorded exactly as shown.
healthy_conditions: The Building Overview screen opens successfully.
The facility layout is visible on the screen.
Individual facility areas are visible within the layout.
A color-coded status is shown for each displayed area.
failure_conditions: The Building Overview screen does not open after pressing OVERVIEW.
The screen does not show the layout of the entire facility.
Displayed facility areas cannot be identified.
One or more displayed areas do not show a color-coded status indication.
The procedure requires interpretation of color meaning not provided by this source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not display the facility layout or area-level color-coded status as described.
Escalate if the screen cannot be accessed by pressing OVERVIEW.
Do not infer the meaning of any color from this section alone; seek additional approved reference or support if interpretation is required.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Primary reference image for the Building Overview screen, including facility layout and area-level color-coded status.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

missing_details: The source does not define the meaning of the displayed colors.
The source does not provide corrective actions if an area is missing a color-coded status.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not define role boundaries beyond operator access to the HMI.
